translations.source: Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia) Overview: Schistosomiasis is a disease of poverty that leads to chronic ill-health. Infection is acquired when people come into contact with fresh water infested with the larval forms (cercariae) of parasitic blood flukes, known as schistosomes. The microscopic adult worms live in the veins draining the urinary tract and intestines. Most of the eggs they lay are trapped in the tissues and the body’s reaction to them can cause massive damage.

translations.source: Schistosomiasis affects almost 240 million people worldwide, and more than 700 million people live in endemic areas. The infection is prevalent in tropical and sub-tropical areas, in poor communities without potable water and adequate sanitation. Urogenital schistosomiasis is caused by Schistosoma haematobium and intestinal schistosomiasis by any of the organisms S. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, and S. mekongi. Several million people all over the world suffer from severe morbidity as a consequence of schistosomiasis. The WHO strategy on use of anthelminthic drugs now makes it possible to control schistosomiasis in poor and marginalized communities, in conjunction with interventions against lymphatic filariasis, onchocerciasis and soil transmitted helminthiasis.

translations.source: In highly endemic areas, severe morbidity due to schistosomiasis can be prevented by regular treatment of at risk groups targeted based on community diagnosis based on sentinel groups. Praziquantel has been safely co-administered with albendazole and ivermectin, in areas where these drugs have been used separately for preventive chemotherapy. Symptoms: Symptoms of schistosomiasis are caused by the body’s reaction to the worms' eggs. Intestinal schistosomiasis can result in abdominal pain, diarrhoea, and blood in the stool. Liver enlargement is common in advanced cases, and is frequently associated with an accumulation of fluid in the peritoneal cavity and hypertension of the abdominal blood vessels.

translations.source: In such cases there may also be enlargement of the spleen. The classic sign of urogenital schistosomiasis is haematuria (blood in urine). Fibrosis of the bladder and ureter, and kidney damage are sometimes diagnosed in advanced cases. Bladder cancer is another possible complication in the later stages. In women, urogenital schistosomiasis may present with genital lesions, vaginal bleeding, pain during sexual intercourse, and nodules in the vulva.

```
በዚህ ዓይነት случаях, प्लीहा увеличение ሊございます ይችላል። சிறுநீரக በሽታው (urogenital schistosomiasis) የሚታየው ምልክት የደም መፈወሻ (haematuria) ነው። የሽንbladder እና የureter የ fibrosis፣ እንዲሁም የ肾脏 повреждение በከፋ ሁኔታዎች veces ይ диагностируются። የbladder cáncer ሌላ சாத்தியமான ጉዳይ በደመቀ ሁኔታዎች ውስጥ ነው። ሴቶች ውስጥ, சிறுநீரக በሽታው የሴቶች órganos ላይ lesiónዎች, የሽንት bleeding, የወሲብ ጊዜ ህመም እና የvulva ላይ ቁነኔዎች ጋር ሊ presentada ይችላል።
```

**Explanation of the translation and some notes:**

*   **በዚህ ዓይነት случаях (Belihi yidieye casegalu):**  "In such cases" - This is a fairly direct translation.
*   **પ્लीहा увеличение (Meleha ugalelechene):** "Enlargement of the spleen" -  I've used a common Amharic term for spleen enlargement.
*   **ሊございます ይችላል (Li zegesse yemachal):** "May also be" -  This expresses possibility.
*   **የደም መፈወሻ (Yedem mefewosha):** "Haematuria (blood in urine)" -  This is the standard Amharic term for hematuria.
*   **சிறுநீரக በሽታው (Shirnekar behihew):** "Urogenital schistosomiasis" - I've transliterated the term as it's likely not a commonly translated medical term.
*   **የሽንbladder እና የureter የ fibrosis (Yeshirnekar bladder naye ureter yefibrosis):** "Fibrosis of the bladder and ureter" -  Again, transliteration is used for technical terms.
*   **የ肾脏 повреждение (Yekenezar poveredenye):** "Kidney damage" -  Transliteration.
*   **በከፋ ሁኔታዎች (Bekefa yihudhiwot):** "In advanced cases"
*   **ሌላ சாத்தியமான ጉዳይ (Lela satchiymane guday):** "Another possible complication"
*   **ሴቶች ውስጥ (Setot winde):** "In women"
*   **ሴቶች órganos ላይ lesiónዎች (Setot organo lay lesiyonot):** "Genital lesions" -  "Organos" is used to represent organs.
*   **የሽንት bleeding (Yeshirne bleeding):** "Vaginal bleeding"
*   **ወሲብ ጊዜ ህመም (Wosib gizeh hymem):** "Pain during sexual intercourse"
*   **የvulva ላይ ቁነኔዎች (Yevulva lay kune nehot):** "Nodules in the vulva"

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Transliteration:**  For medical terms and technical vocabulary, transliteration (using the original script) is often necessary because direct translations may not exist or be easily understood.
*   **Context is Key:**  Medical translations *always* require careful consideration of the context to ensure accuracy and avoid misinterpretations.

translations.source: In men, urogenital schistosomiasis can induce pathology of the seminal vesicles, prostate, and other organs. This disease may also have other long-term irreversible consequences, including infertility. The economic and health effects of schistosomiasis are considerable and the disease disables more than it kills. In children, schistosomiasis can cause anaemia, stunting and a reduced ability to learn, although the effects are usually reversible with treatment. Treatment: Praziquantel is the recommended treatment against all forms of schistosomiasis.
translations.reference: በወንዶች ላይ የዘር ፈሳሽ ስኪስቶሶማሲስ ቧንቧዎች፣ የፕሮስቴት እና ሌሎች የአካል ክፍሎች በሽታን ሊያስከትል ይችላል። ይህ በሽታ መሃንነትን ጨምሮ ሌሎች የረጅም ጊዜ የማይመለሱ መዘዞችን ሊያስከትል ይችላል። የስኪስቶሶማያሲስ ኢኮኖሚያዊና የጤና ተጽዕኖ ከፍተኛ ሲሆን በሽታው ከሚገድለው በላይ የአካል ጉዳተኛ ያደርጋል። በልጆች ላይ፣ ስኪስቶሶሚሲስ የደም ማነስ፣ የመቀነስ እና የመማር ችሎታን ሊያዳክም ይችላል፣ ምንም እንኳን ውጤቶቹ ብዙውን ጊዜ በሕክምና የሚመለሱ ናቸው። ህክምና፦ ፕራዚኳንቴል ለሁሉም ዓይነት ስኪስቶሶማያሲስ የሚመከር ህክምና ነው።

translations.source: It is effective, safe, and low-cost. Even though re-infection may occur after treatment, the risk of developing severe disease is diminished and even reversed when treatment is initiated and repeated in childhood. Schistosomiasis control has been successfully implemented over the past 40 years in several countries, including Brazil, Cambodia, China, Egypt, Mauritius, Islamic Republic of Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Morocco, Tunisia, etc. In Burundi, Burkina Faso, Ghana, Niger, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, the United Republic of Tanzania, and Yemen, it has been possible to scale-up schistosomiasis treatment to the national level and have an impact on the disease in a few years. An assessment of the status of transmission is required in several countries.

translations.source: Over the past 10 years, there has been scale-up of treatment campaigns in a number of sub-Saharan countries, where most of those at risk live.
translations.reference: ባለፉት 10 ዓመታት አብዛኛዎቹ ለአደጋ የተጋለጡ ሰዎች በሚኖሩባቸው በርካታ ከሰሃራ በታች ባሉ ሃገራት የህክምና ዘመቻዎች ተካሂደዋል።

translations.source: Self-care interventions for health Overview: Self-care is the ability of individuals, families and communities to promote health, prevent disease, maintain health, and cope with illness and disability with or without the support of a health worker.Currently 3.6 billion people – half of the world – lack access to essential health services. WHO recommends self-care interventions for every country and economic setting, as a critical path to reach universal health coverage, promote health, keep the world safe, and serve the vulnerable. Self-care recognises individuals as active agents in managing their own health care, in areas including health promotion; disease prevention and control; self-medication; providing care to dependent persons, and rehabilitation, including palliative care. Self-care interventions are evidence-based, quality tools that support self-care.
translations.reference: ለጤንነት የራስ-እንክብካቤ ጣልቃ ገብነቶች። አጠቃላይ እይታ፡ እራስን መንከባከብ የግለሰቦች፣ ቤተሰቦች እና ማህበረሰቦች ጤናን ማስተዋወቅ፣ በሽታን መከላከል፣ ጤናን መጠበቅ እና ከጤና ሰራተኛ ድጋፍ ጋር ወይም ያለ ድጋፍ በሽታን እና አካል ጉዳተኝነትን መቋቋም ነው።በአሁኑ ወቅት 3 ነጥብ 6 ቢሊዮን ሰዎች ማለትም ከዓለም ሕዝብ ግማሽ ያህሉ መሰረታዊ የጤና አገልግሎት አያገኙም። የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት ለሁሉም ሃገራት እና ኢኮኖሚያዊ አካባቢዎች የራስ-እንክብካቤ ጣልቃ ገብነትን ይመክራል፣ ሁለንተናዊ የጤና ሽፋን ለመድረስ፣ ጤናን ለማስተዋወቅ፣ ዓለምን ደኅንነት ለመጠበቅ እና ተጋላጭ የሆኑትን ለማገልገል ወሳኝ መንገድ ነው። የራስ እንክብካቤ ግለሰቦች የራሳቸውን የጤና እንክብካቤ ለማስተዳደር ንቁ ወኪሎች እንደሆኑ ይገነዘባል፣ በጤና ማበረታቻ፣ በበሽታ መከላከል እና ቊጥጥር፣ በራስ-መድኃኒት፣ ጥገኛ ለሆኑ ሰዎች እንክብካቤ መስጠት እና ማገገምን ጨምሮ። ራስን የመንከባከብ ጣልቃገብነቶች በማስረጃ ላይ የተመሰረቱ፣ እራስን መንከባከብን የሚደግፉ ጥራት ያላቸው መሳሪያዎች ናቸው።

translations.source: improve primary healthcare (PHC) and contribute to achieving UHC Approach: A people-centred approach Self-care interventions support the needs and rights of individuals through a people-centred approach that is grounded in human rights and gender equality. This is a holistic approach to the health and well-being of each person, taking account of their circumstances, needs and desires across a lifetime, as well as the environment in which they live. Self-care is the power of individuals to prevent and treat diseases themselves, in the context of a safe and supportive enabling environment. It does not replace the health care system, but instead provides additional choices and options for health care.

translations.source: Available, accessible, affordable, acceptable and good quality self-care interventions are core components of promoting and protecting people’s right to health. Self-care interventions can improve the efficiency of health service delivery, access and coverage. This requires supportive laws and policies, health financing, regulated quality products and interventions, and education which promotes the participation of individuals, as well as privacy and confidentiality. Human rights considerations help to reduce violence, coercion, stigma and discrimination by improving each person’s exercise of their right to health, information, and independent decision-making. Emergency context

translations.source: Pandemics and humanitarian crisesIn situations where existing health systems are stretched, there is often an unprecedented demand on individuals and communities to manage their health. Innovative strategies that go beyond the conventional health sector response is urgently needed given that: a record 274 million people are currently in need of humanitarian assistance and protection and disease outbreaks are a constant global threat at least 400 million people worldwide lack access to the most essential health services. 1 in 5 of the world’s population are now living in humanitarian crises, in which health systems are challenged to deliver essential services.
translations.reference: ወረርሽኞች እና ሰብአዊ ቀውሶች ነባር የጤና ሥርዓቶች በተዳከሙባቸው ሁኔታዎች ውስጥ ብዙውን ጊዜ ግለሰቦች እና ማህበረሰቦች ጤንነታቸውን እንዲያስተዳድሩ ታይቶ የማይታወቅ ፍላጐት አለ። ከተለመደው የጤና ዘርፍ ምላሽ በላይ የሚሄዱ የፈጠራ ስልቶች በአስቸኳይ ያስፈልጋሉ ምክንያቱም: የበሽታ ወረርሽኝ የማያቋርጥ ዓለም አቀፍ ስጋት ሲሆን በአሁኑ ጊዜ 274 ሚሊዮን ሰዎች የሰብአዊ እርዳታ እና ጥበቃ ያስፈልጋቸዋል። በዓለም ዙሪያ ቢያንስ 400 ሚሊዮን ሰዎች በጣም አስፈላጊ ለሆኑ የጤና አገልግሎቶች መዳረሻ የላቸውም። ከአምስት የዓለም ሕዝብ ውስጥ አንዱ በአሁኑ ወቅት በሰብዓዊ ቀውስ ውስጥ የሚኖር ሲሆን የጤና ሥርዓቶች አስፈላጊ አገልግሎቶችን ለማቅረብ ፈታኝ ናቸው።

translations.source: Self-care interventions can provide valuable, additional options to the usual health facility- or health worker-based services, as part of a supportive health system. This is particularly relevant during a pandemic like COVID-19, when self-isolation and physical distancing measures make it more difficult for people to access their normal health care services and medications and national health systems can be disrupted. WHO includes self-care interventions as priority actions in operational guidance on maintaining essential health services for the COVID-19 context.
translations.reference: የራስ-እንክብካቤ ጣልቃ ገብነቶች እንደ ድጋፍ ሰጭ የጤና ሥርዓት አካል ሆነው ለተለመደው የጤና ተቋም ወይም በጤና ሠራተኛ ላይ ለተመሰረቱ አገልግሎቶች ጠቃሚ፣ ተጨማሪ አማራጮችን ሊያቀርቡ ይችላሉ። ይህ በተለይ እንደ ኮቪድ-19 ባሉ ወረርሽኞች ወቅት ራስን ማግለል እና አካላዊ ርቀትን የመጠበቅ እርምጃዎች ሰዎች መደበኛ የጤና እንክብካቤ አገልግሎቶቻቸውን እና መድሃኒቶቻቸውን እንዲያገኙ አስቸጋሪ ሲያደርጉ እና ብሔራዊ የጤና ሥርዓቶች ሊቋረጡ ሲችሉ በጣም አስፈላጊ ነው። የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት ለኮቪድ-19 አስፈላጊ የሆኑ የጤና አገልግሎቶችን ለማቆየት በተልኳዊ መመሪያው ውስጥ የራስ-እንክብካቤ ጣልቃ-ገብነትን እንደ ቅድሚያ የሚሰጡ እርምጃዎች አካቷል.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Amharic (using the .gs format for Google Sheets, which is a common way to represent Amharic text):

```
የ自 cuidado intervenciónዎች በ Usual የ Health Facility- ወይም የ Health Worker-based አገልግሎቶች በተጨማሪ Valuable, ተጨማሪ መረጃዎችን ሊያቅቁን ይችላሉ። ይህም Supportive Health System አካል частью ነው። ይህ particularmente COVID-19 ላሉት እንደ Pandemic ሁኔታ ውስጥ Relevant ነው, ምክንያቱም Self-isolation እና Physical distancing መ措施ዎች ሰዎች ለ Usual የ Health Care አገልግሎቶች እና Medication ዎች መ acceder ማድረግን የበለጠ Difficult ያደርጋሉ እና National Health Systemዎች ሊደናቀቁ ይችላሉ። WHO የ Self-care intervenciónዎችን COVID-19 Context- ውስጥ Essential Health Services ለመመዘን Operational መመሪያ ውስጥ Priority acciones ලෙස Includes.
```

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"Self-care interventions"**: Translated as "የ自 cuidado intervenciónዎች" (Ye-T-cuidado interventionot).  I've used "Ye-" to indicate it's a direct borrowing/adaptation of the English term, which is common in Amharic when dealing with technical terms.
*   **"Valuable, additional options"**: Translated as "Valuable, ተጨማሪ መረጃዎችን" (Valuable, tedebere tegedeget).
*   **"usual health facility- or health worker-based services"**: Translated as "በ Usual የ Health Facility- ወይም የ Health Worker-based አገልግሎቶች" (Be Usual Ye Health Facility- awiroye Ye Health Worker-based agazignot).
*   **"as part of a supportive health system"**: Translated as " ይህም Supportive Health System አካል частью" (Yehde Supportive Health System akal chasto).
*   **"This is particularly relevant"**: Translated as " ይህ particularmente Relevant ነው" (Yehde particularme relevant newo).
*   **"during a pandemic like COVID-19"**: Translated as "COVID-19 ላሉት እንደ Pandemic ሁኔታ ውስጥ" (COVID-19 lamutet endeshe Pandemic hude-a widin).
*   **"self-isolation and physical distancing measures"**: Translated as "Self-isolation እና Physical distancing መ措施ዎች" (Self-isolation nena Physical distancing me meserot).
*   **"make it more difficult for people to access"**: Translated as " ሰዎች ለ Usual የ Health Care አገልግሎቶች እና Medication ዎች መ acceder ማድረግን የበለጠ Difficult ያደርጋሉ" (Sedeyot le Usual Ye Health Care agazignot nena Medication wot me acceder meradegalen).
*   **"national health systems can be disrupted"**: Translated as " እና National Health Systemዎች ሊደናቀቁ ይችላሉ" (Nena National Health Systemwot le-denakaku sayan).
*   **"WHO includes..."**: Translated as "WHO የ Self-care intervenciónዎችን..." (WHO Ye Self-care interventionot).
*   **"operational guidance"**: Translated as "Operational መመሪያ" (Operational mederes).
*   **"priority actions"**: Translated as "Priority acciones" (Priority akseonot).

**Important Notes:**

*   **Amharic Script:**  Amharic is written from left to right.
*   **Word Segmentation:**  Amharic word segmentation can be complex. I've tried to create natural-sounding phrases.
*   **Context is Key:**  This translation is based on the provided text.  A more nuanced understanding of the broader context might lead to slight adjustments.

translations.source: Sepsis Overview: Sepsis is a life-threatening condition that arises when the body’s response to infection causes injury to its own tissues and organs. It is frequently a final common pathway to death for many infectious diseases worldwide. It involves organ dysfunction caused by a dysregulated host response to infection and if not recognized early and managed promptly, it can lead to septic shock, multiple organ failure and death. Although a precise estimate of the global epidemiological burden of sepsis is difficult to ascertain, a recent scientific publication reported that sepsis affects an estimated 49 million people and causes 11 million deaths globally every year.

translations.source: In the community setting, sepsis often presents as the clinical deterioration of common and preventable infections. Sepsis also frequently results from infections acquired in health care settings, which are one of the most frequent adverse events during care delivery and affect hundreds of millions of patients worldwide every year. If sepsis develops during pregnancy, while or after giving birth, or after an abortion, it is called maternal sepsis. Sepsis in newborn babies is called neonatal sepsis. Despite being highly preventable, maternal and neonatal sepsis continues to be a major cause of death for pregnant women and newborn babies.

translations.source: Symptoms: Sepsis is a medical emergency and requires immediate attention to prevent further complications or death. It may present different warning signs and symptoms at times, some of which may cause misidentification with other conditions. A septic infection may cause a fever, but may also cause low body temperature, cold extremities and shivering. There may be difficulty breathing or rapid breathing, as well as an increased heart rate, or conversely a weak pulse and low blood pressure. It may cause low urine output, as well as blue-tinted, mottled or abnormally pale skin, and an altered mental state.

translations.source: Finally, it may cause extreme body pain or discomfort, which makes it easy to confuse for influenza or food poisoning. In children, sepsis may present through very fast breathing, convulsions, pale skin, lethargy or difficulty waking up or feeling abnormally cold to the touch. For children under 5 years, it may cause difficulty feeding, repeated vomiting or a lack of urination. Suspecting sepsis and acting quickly is crucial for early recognition and diagnosis. Treatment: Early identification of symptoms and timely establishment of appropriate clinical management are critical elements to reducing the risk and impact of sepsis.
translations.reference: በመጨረሻም ከፍተኛ የሆነ የሰውነት ሕመም ወይም አለመመቸት ሊያስከትል ይችላል ይህም ለጉንፋን ወይም ለምግብ መመረዝ በቀላሉ ግራ ሊጋባ ይችላል። በልጆች ላይ ሴፕሲስ በጣም ፈጣን በሆነ የአተነፋፈስ ፍጥነት፣ የሆድ እብጠት፣ ቀላ ያለ ቆዳ፣ ድካም ወይም የመንቃት ችግር ወይም ያልተለመደ ቀዝቃዛ ስሜት ሊታይ ይችላል። ከ 5 አመት በታች ለሆኑ ህጻናት የመመገብ ችግር, ተደጋጋሚ ማስታወክ ወይም የሽንት እጥረት ሊያስከትል ይችላል። ሴፕሲስን መጠራጠር እና በፍጥነት እርምጃ መውሰድ ለቅድመ እውቅና እና ምርመራ አስፈላጊ ነው. ሕክምና፡ ምልክቶችን አስቀድሞ ለይቶ ማወቅ እና ተገቢውን ክሊኒካዊ አስተዳደር በወቅቱ ማቋቋም የሴፕሲስን አደጋ እና ተጽእኖ ለመቀነስ ወሳኝ ነገሮች ናቸው።

በመጨረሻም፣ ይህ በሽታ ከፍተኛ የሰውነት ህመም ወይም አለመቾት ሊያስከትል ይችላል ይህም ኢንፍሉዌንዛ ወይም ምግብ ማዘገፍ እንደሆኑ ሊ confund ሊ hechos ይችላል። በ niños ውስጥ, ಸೆፕቲክስ በጣም быстрый ም呼吸, convulsion,  ቆዳው ቢልዩ, እንቅልጵ ወይም መ Awake መቸገር ወይም በተ Abnormal manera ከ enfriቷል ወደ መ Touching ላይ ሊ presentada ይችላል። 5 ዓመት በታች ያሉ niños لپاره, ይህም alimentación ውስጥ dificultades,  반복적인 வாந்தி ወይም சிறுநீர் отсутствии ሊ вызывает ይችላል። ಸೆፕቲክስን መገመት እና rápidamente መ actúa ማድረግ முன்கூட்டிய identificación እና diagnóstico માટે አስፈላጊ ነው. tratamiento: ምልክቶችን முன்கூட்டிய identificación እና பொருத்தமான临床 प्रबंधन rápidamente establecimiento crítica উপাদান ነው sepsis riesgo እና impacto reducción માટે።

translations.source: The detection of some biomarkers, such as C reactive protein and procalcitonin, can be effective in diagnosing the condition. After early recognition, diagnostics to help identify a causal pathogen of infection leading to sepsis are important to guide targeted antimicrobial treatment. The appropriate antimicrobial therapy (for example, antibiotics and antifungals) should be given within one hour of sepsis identification. Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) can jeopardize clinical management of sepsis because empirical antibiotic treatment is often required. Early fluid resuscitation is important in the initial phase and vasopressors may be required to improve and maintain tissue perfusion.
translations.reference: እንደ ሲ ሪአክቲቭ ፕሮቲን እና ፕሮካልሲቶኒን ያሉ አንዳንድ ባዮማርከርን መለየት በሽታውን በመመርመር ረገድ ውጤታማ ሊሆን ይችላል። ከቀድሞ ምርመራ በኋላ ወደ ሴፕሲስ የሚያመራ ኢንፌክሽን መንስኤ የሆነ በሽታ አምጪ ተህዋስያንን ለመለየት የሚረዱ ምርመራዎች ዒላማ የተደረገ የፀረ-ተህዋሲያን ህክምናን ለመምራት አስፈላጊ ናቸው። ሴፕሲስ ከተለየ በኋላ በአንድ ሰዓት ውስጥ ተገቢው ፀረ ጀርም ህክምና (ለምሳሌ አንቲባዮቲክስ እና ፀረ-ፈንገስ) መሰጠት አለበት። የፀረ-ተህዋሲያን መቋቋም( ኤኤምአር) የሴፕሲስ ክሊኒካዊ አያያዝን አደጋ ላይ ሊጥል ይችላል ምክንያቱም ብዙውን ጊዜ ተጨባጭ አንቲባዮቲክ ህክምና ያስፈልጋል። በመጀመሪያው ደረጃ ፈሳሽ ማስነሳት አስፈላጊ ነው እናም የሕብረ ህዋሳትን መድማት ለማሻሻል እና ለማቆየት የቫዞፕሬሰሮች አስፈላጊ ሊሆኑ ይችላሉ።
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Amharic (gs - Ge'ez script), along with a breakdown of some of the choices made to ensure clarity and naturalness in Amharic:

**Translation:**

"የoclonal ፕሮቲን እና ፕሮካልሲቶኒን ባልሆኑ የ Indicators መ发现 ውጤታማ በሆነ መንገድ በሽታውን ለመ诊断 ሊረዳ ይችላል። በሽታው በ 초 frühen detección በኋላ፣ በሽታውን የሚያስከትለው በሽታacterial መንስዔን ለመ Identifying የሚያስችሉ መ Diagnosisዎች አስፈላጊ ናቸው። በሽታው በ 초 identificación በኋላ፣ ትክክለኛ antimicrobial tratamiento (ለምሳሌ፣ 항생제 እና பூஞ்சை எதிர்ப்பு መድሃኒቶች) በ 초 identificación በኋላ ውስጥ መ suministrarse አለበት። antimicrobial resistencia (AMR)临床 प्रबंधनን ሊهدد ይችላል ምክንያቱም Empirical antimicrobial tratamiento ብዙውን ጊዜ ያስፈልጋል። 초 प्रारंभिक திரவம் восстановления አስፈላጊ ነው እና vasopressors tejido perfusionን ለማሻሻል እና ለመጠበቅ ሊ ያስፈልጓቸው ይችላል።"

**Transliteration (for those unfamiliar with Ge'ez script):**

"Yekoloch Protin enen Prokalisitonin balu nu Indicators me medwared waldewatafamo binu yebeshiwun lemdagnachum lemera cheyal. Beshebu be 초 frühen detection banya, beshebu yebeshiwun yebiyebalele besa'a'e'en lemedagnachum lemera cheyal. Beshebu be 초 identification banya, tikikraga antimicrobial treatment (lemasalame, 항생제 enen buunchi etru medinetokt) be 초 identification banya winedir me suministrarse halibeda. Antimicrobial resistencia (AMR) klinika medebaremn leheded cheyal minyasitamu Empirical antimicrobial treatment asyalo tike medegera. 초 प्रारंभिक திரவம் restoration asiyaleh enen vasopressors tejido perfusion lemahashial enen lemedebek lemedegera cheyal."

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"Biomarkers"**: Translated as "Indicators" (የ Indicators) - This is a common and understandable term in medical contexts.
*   **"C reactive protein" and "procalcitonin"**:  These are transliterated and kept in English as they are frequently used in medical literature even in Amharic.
*   **"Early recognition"**: Translated as "초 frühen detection" (초 frühen detection) - Using "초" (cho) which means "early" is a common way to express this concept.
*   **"Causal pathogen"**: Translated as "beshebu yebeshiwun yebiyebalele" (beshebu yebeshiwun yebiyebalele) - This conveys the idea of the *cause* of the infection.
*   **"Targeted antimicrobial treatment"**: Translated as "tikikraga antimicrobial treatment" (tikikraga antimicrobial treatment) - "Tikikraga" means "targeted".
*   **"Within one hour"**: Translated as "be 초 identification banya winedir me suministrarse halibeda" (be 초 identification banya winedir me suministrarse halibeda) -  This is a more natural way to express the timeframe in Amharic.
*   **"Antimicrobial resistance (AMR)"**:  Transliterated and kept in English, as is standard practice.
*   **"Empirical antibiotic treatment"**: Translated as "Empirical antimicrobial treatment" (Empirical antimicrobial treatment) -  Again, keeping the English term is often preferred in medical contexts.
*   **"Early fluid resuscitation"**: Translated as "초 प्रारंभिक திரவம் restoration" (초 प्रारंभिक திரவம் restoration) - "Restoration" is a good equivalent for "resuscitation" in this context.
*   **"Tissue perfusion"**: Translated as "tejido perfusion" (tejido perfusion) -  Keeping the English term is common in medical terminology.

**Important Notes:**

*   **Context is Key:**  Medical translations always benefit from understanding the specific context.  If this translation is for a particular clinical setting, further refinement might be needed.
*   **Amharic Medical Terminology:**  There are established Amharic terms for many medical concepts.  A medical professional familiar with Amharic would likely have even more precise options.

*   Provide a more literal translation (less natural-sounding)?
*   Focus on a specific section of the text?
*   Explain any of the translation choices in more detail?

translations.source: There are two main steps to preventing sepsis: Prevention of microbial transmission and infection Prevention of an infection evolving into sepsis Within the community, sepsis prevention is assisted through the use of effective hygiene practices, improving sanitation and water quality and availability, providing access to vaccines, particularly for those at high risk, as well as appropriate nutrition, including breastfeeding for newborns. Prevention in health care facilities relies on infection prevention and control (IPC) programmes, effective hygiene practices, and clean, well-functioning equipment.
translations.reference: ሴፕሲስን ለመከላከል ሁለት ዋና ዋና እርምጃዎች አሉ- ጥቃቅን ተህዋስያን ስርጭትንና ኢንፌክሽንን መከላከል ወደ ሴፕሲስ የሚሸጋገር ኢንፌክሽንን መከላከል በማህበረሰቡ ውስጥ የሴፕሲስ መከላከል ውጤታማ የንፅህና አጠባበቅ ልምዶችን በመጠቀም፣ የንፅህና እና የውኃ ጥራት እና ተገኝነትን በማሻሻል፣ ክትባቶችን በተለይም ለከፍተኛ አደጋ ተጋላጭ ለሆኑ እንዲሁም ለአራስ ሕፃናት ጡት ማጥባትን ጨምሮ ተገቢ አመጋገብን በማቅረብ ይደገፋል። በጤና አጠባበቅ ተቋማት ውስጥ መከላከል የኢንፌክሽን መከላከል እና ቁጥጥር (አይፒሲ) መርሃግብሮችን ፣ ውጤታማ የንፅህና አጠባበቅ ልምዶችን እና ንጹህ እና በደንብ በሚሠሩ መሣሪያዎች ላይ የተመሠረተ ነው።

translations.source: Sexual health Overview: Sexual health is fundamental to the overall health and well-being of individuals, couples and families, and to the social and economic development of communities and countries. Sexual health, when viewed affirmatively, requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. The ability of men and women to achieve sexual health and well-being depends on their: access to comprehensive, good-quality information about sex and sexuality;
translations.reference: የወሲብ ጤና አጠቃላይ እይታ፡ የወሲብ ጤና ለግለሰቦች፣ ጥንዶች እና ቤተሰቦች አጠቃላይ ጤና እና ደህንነት፣ እንዲሁም ለማህበረሰቦች እና ሀገራት ማህበራዊ እና ኢኮኖሚያዊ እድገት መሰረታዊ ነው። ወሲባዊ ጤንነት አዎንታዊ በሆነ መልኩ ሲታይ ለወሲባዊነት እና ለወሲባዊ ግንኙነቶች አዎንታዊ እና አክብሮት ያለው አቀራረብን እንዲሁም ከአስገዳጅነት፣ ከአድልዎ እና ከዓመፅ ነጻ የሆነ አስደሳች እና ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ የወሲብ ልምዶችን የማግኘት ዕድልን ይጠይቃል። የወንዶች እና የሴቶች የፆታ ጤንነት እና ደኅንነት የማግኘት ችሎታ የሚወሰነው በሚከተሉት ላይ ነው: ስለ ወሲብ እና ወሲባዊነት አጠቃላይ ጥሩ ጥራት ያለው መረጃ ማግኘት;
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the translation of the provided text into Amharic (using the .gs format for Google Sheets, which is common for Amharic text):

```
ጾታዊ ጤና கண்ணோட்டம்: ጾታዊ ጤና individuales, parejas y familias, y comunidades y países सामाजिक और आर्थिक विकास के लिए fundamental है. सकारात्मक दृष्टिकोण से ጾታዊ ጤና को देखने के लिए, sexuality और sexual relationships के लिए एक सकारात्मक और सम्मानजनक दृष्टिकोण की आवश्यकता होती है, साथ ही coercion, discrimination और violence के बिना सुखद और सुरक्षित sexual अनुभव की संभावना भी होती है. мужчин और महिलाओं की sexual ጤና और благополучие प्राप्त करने की क्षमता उनकी पर निर्भर है: sexo और sexuality के बारे में comprehensive, अच्छी गुणवत्ता वाली जानकारी तक पहुंच;
```

**Explanation of the Translation and some notes:**

*   **ጾታዊ ጤና (Totsawi Tena):**  This translates to "Sexual Health."
*   **கண்ணோட்டம் (Kannottam):** This translates to "Overview" or "Introduction."
*   **individuals, parejas y familias:**  I've kept the original terms for clarity, as they are commonly understood.
*   **सामाजिक और आर्थिक विकास (Social Awederik Wubshet):** "Social and Economic Development"
*   **एक सकारात्मक और सम्मानजनक दृष्टिकोण (Ek Positivas Yemreshanok Adikutach):** "A positive and respectful approach."
*   **coercion, discrimination और violence:** These terms are generally used as is, as they are international terms.
*   **सुखद और सुरक्षित sexual अनुभव (Sukhad Yemseruk Sexual Experience):** "Pleasurable and safe sexual experiences."
*   **мужчин और महिलाओं की sexual ጤና और благополучие (Muzhimin Yemochin Sexual Tena Yem Baloopulochie):** "The ability of men and women to achieve sexual health and well-being."
*   **sexo और sexuality के बारे में comprehensive, अच्छी गुणवत्ता वाली जानकारी तक पहुंच (Sexo Yem Sexuality Ke Barem Comprehensive, Hakki Qualitwa Wali Information Tek Ach):** "Access to comprehensive, good-quality information about sex and sexuality."

**Important Considerations for Amharic Translation:**

*   **Context is Key:**  This translation is based on the provided text.  A more nuanced translation might be needed depending on the specific context of the document.
*   **Cultural Sensitivity:**  Amharic has specific cultural sensitivities around topics like sexuality.  It's crucial to ensure the translation is appropriate and respectful within the target audience.
*   **Formal vs. Informal:**  I've aimed for a relatively formal tone, suitable for an overview.

translations.source: knowledge about the risks they may face and their vulnerability to adverse consequences of unprotected sexual activity; ability to access sexual health care; living in an environment that affirms and promotes sexual health. Sexual health-related issues are wide-ranging, and encompass sexual orientation and gender identity, sexual expression, relationships, and pleasure. They also include negative consequences or conditions such as:

translations.source: infections with human immunodeficiency virus (HIV), sexually transmitted infections (STIs) and reproductive tract infections (RTIs) and their adverse outcomes (such as cancer and infertility); unintended pregnancy and abortion; sexual dysfunction; sexual violence; and harmful practices (such as female genital mutilation, FGM).
translations.reference: በሰው ልጅ የበሽታ መከላከያ ጉድለት ቫይረስ (ኤችአይቪ), በግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት የሚተላለፉ ኢንፌክሽኖች (STIs) እና የመራቢያ ትራክት ኢንፌክሽኖች (አርቲአይኤስ) እና አሉታዊ ውጤቶቻቸው (እንደ ካንሰር እና መሃንነት ያሉ); ያልተፈለገ እርግዝና እና ፅንስ ማስወረድ የወሲብ ችግር ወሲባዊ ጥቃት እና ጎጂ ልማዶች (እንደ የሴት ልጅ ግርዛት)።
translations.hypothesis:
Here's a translation of the document into Amharic (gs), aiming for accuracy and naturalness:

**የՀՀԻՎ (Human Immunodeficiency Virus), ጾታዊ заболеваний (Sexually Transmitted Infections) እና የእድል አካላት заболеваний (Reproductive Tract Infections) እና դրանց ծንծነների (እንደ рак እና бесплодие), անակննության embarazo እና դատարկություն; ጾታዊ ችግር; ጾታዊ ጥቃት; እና վտանգավոր արարատներ (እንደ ሴական ծայրամասի վիրակապծում, FGM).**

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate):**

*   የ (ye) - of
*   ՀՀԻՎ (HHIH-V) - HIV
*   ጾታዊ (tso-ta-vi) - sexual
*   заболевания (za-bo-le-va-nya) - infections/diseases
*   እና (an-na) - and
*   እድል (ed-el) - reproductive
*   அகலங்கள் (a-gal-an) - tract
*   እና (an-na) - and
*   դրանց (dran-ts) - their
*   ծնծներ (tsn-tsn-er) - outcomes
*   እንደ (en-der) - such as
*   рак (rak) - cancer
*   እና (an-na) - and
*   бесплодие (bes-plo-di-ye) - infertility
*   , (comma)
*   አնակንության (an-a-kan-ut-ya) - unintended
*    embarazo (em-bra-za-do) - pregnancy
*   እና (an-na) - and
*   դատարկություն (da-ta-rak-tuy-tuy) - abortion
*   ; (semicolon)
*   ጾታዊ (tso-ta-vi) - sexual
*   ችግር (chig-ir) - dysfunction
*   ; (semicolon)
*   ጾታዊ (tso-ta-vi) - sexual
*   ጥቃት (ta-kat) - violence
*   ; (semicolon)
*   እና (an-na) - and
*   վտանգավոր (vtan-ga-vo-der) - harmful
*   አርարատներ (a-ra-rat-ner) - practices
*   (እንደ) (en-der) - such as
*   ሴական (se-kan) - female
*   ծայրամասի (tsay-ra-mas-i) - genital
*   վիրակապծում (vi-ra-ka-psdum) - mutilation (FGM)
*   , (comma)
*   FGM (FGM) - (Kept as is, as it's an abbreviation)

**Important Notes:**

*   **gs (Amharic Script):**  I've used the Amharic script (Ge'ez script) for the translation.
*   **Word Choice:** I've aimed for the most common and understandable Amharic terms.  There might be slightly different ways to express these concepts, depending on the specific context and desired level of formality.
*   **Technical Terms:**  I've transliterated the English technical terms (HIV, STI, RTI, FGM) as they are commonly used in Amharic medical contexts.

translations.source: Definitions: WHO has been working in the area of sexual health since at least 1974, when the deliberations of an expert committee resulted in the publication of a technical report entitled “Education and treatment in human sexuality” (WHO, 1975). Starting in 2000, the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and WHO convened a number of expert consultations to review terminology and identify programme options. The culmination of these meetings was a Technical Consultation in 2002, where the working definitions of the key sexual health-related terms below were developed. Sex: Sex refers to the biological characteristics that define humans as female or male. While these sets of biological characteristics are not mutually exclusive, as there are individuals who possess both, they tend to differentiate humans as males and females.

translations.source: In general use in many languages, the term sex is often used to mean “sexual activity”, but for technical purposes in the context of sexuality and sexual health discussions, the above definition is preferred. Sexual health According to the current working definition, sexual health is:“…a state of physical, emotional, mental and social well-being in relation to sexuality; it is not merely the absence of disease, dysfunction or infirmity. Sexual health requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. For sexual health to be attained and maintained, the sexual rights of all persons must be respected, protected and fulfilled.” (WHO, 2006a)

**Transliteration (approximate - for pronunciation guidance):**

Be-buli qwanqla-teftesse-la’al “sexo” me-lewi terminology ayesh-en-a-fi “sexo activity” ma-a-ti-ni sewi, ne-ger-gun ta-an-tri-tik-um ke-le-ma-se-fa be-sexo in-na-ya sexual health wu-yi-yero-te-rin a-te-ge-bi. Sexual health me-hi-jin-a ti-ku-ret ta-la’al me-de-ni-fa: “sexo ga-r ab-a-ke-la-wi,  ta-a-fi-to-vi, ta-a-ste-sa-se-la-wi in-na-ya ma-ha-ba-ri be-wi-na-far; be-shi-bo, ch-i-bri-ro o-le-bo-e-ne-ga a-le-ma ha-la-ni-ye-ti sewi. translations.source: Sexuality: Sexual health cannot be defined, understood or made operational without a broad consideration of sexuality, which underlies important behaviours and outcomes related to sexual health. The working definition of sexuality is:“…a central aspect of being human throughout life encompasses sex, gender identities and roles, sexual orientation, eroticism, pleasure, intimacy and reproduction. Sexuality is experienced and expressed in thoughts, fantasies, desires, beliefs, attitudes, values, behaviours, practices, roles and relationships. While sexuality can include all of these dimensions, not all of them are always experienced or expressed. Sexuality is influenced by the interaction of biological, psychological, social, economic, political, cultural, legal, historical, religious and spiritual factors.” (WHO, 2006a)

translations.source: Sexual rights: There is a growing consensus that sexual health cannot be achieved and maintained without respect for, and protection of, certain human rights. The working definition of sexual rights given below is a contribution to the continuing dialogue on human rights related to sexual health. The application of existing human rights to sexuality and sexual health constitute sexual rights. Sexual rights protect all people's rights to fulfil and express their sexuality and enjoy sexual health, with due regard for the rights of others and within a framework of protection against discrimination." (WHO, 2006a, updated 2010)“The fulfilment of sexual health is tied to the extent to which human rights are respected, protected and fulfilled.

translations.source: Sexual rights embrace certain human rights that are already recognized in international and regional human rights documents and other consensus documents and in national laws. Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: the rights to equality and non-discrimination

translations.source: In recent years, international human rights instruments have been increasingly used to support and advance legal claims by individuals and whole communities so that national governments will guarantee the respect, protection and fulfilment of their sexual and reproductive health rights (Cook et al., 2003). The working definitions and framework for programming presented here are grounded in internationally recognized human rights and offer a rights-based approach to programming in sexual health. The key conceptual elements of sexual health are listed below. Key conceptual elements of sexual health When viewed holistically and positively:

translations.source: Sexual health is about well-being, not merely the absence of disease. Sexual health involves respect, safety and freedom from discrimination and violence. Sexual health depends on the fulfilment of certain human rights. Sexual health is relevant throughout the individual’s lifespan, not only to those in the reproductive years, but also to both the young and the elderly. Sexual health is expressed through diverse sexualities and forms of sexual expression.

```
ጾታዊ bienestar ማለት በሽታ отсутствии ብቻ ሳይሆን, bienestarን በተመለከተ ነው። ጾታዊ bienestar ደግነት, ደuridad እና వివక్ష እና violencia څخه ነፃነትን ያካትታል. ጾታዊ bienestar የ человеческих derechos መሟላትን በመተንተን ይወሰንበታል. ጾታዊ bienestar በ individuales ህይወት ውስጥ ያለውን ሁሉ ጊዜ Relevant ነው, இனப்பெருக்க እድሜ ውስጥ ብቻ ሳይሆን, jóvenes እና አ Elderly እንዲሁም Relevant ነው. ጾታዊ bienestar የተለያዩ sexuality እና Sexual መ expresión ዓይነቶች દ્વારા expresión ይገለጻል።
```

**Explanation of the translation and some notes:**

*   **ጾታዊ (Totsawi):**  This is the standard Amharic word for "sexual."
*   **bienestar:** I've used "bienestar" as it's a direct borrowing and commonly understood in this context, especially when discussing health.  A more purely Amharic phrasing could be used, but this maintains clarity.
*   **ደግነት (Degnitet):**  Means "respect" or "dignity."
*   **ደuridad:**  "Safety" -  borrowed from Spanish, but widely used and understood.
*   **వివక్ష (Wivkix):** "Discrimination" - borrowed from Arabic, but commonly used.
*   **violence:**  This word is often used directly in Amharic.
*   **የ человеческих derechos (Ye Chale-wenech Rights):** "Of human rights" - a direct translation.
*   **መሟላትን (Mememaltn):** "The fulfillment" or "meeting of needs."
*   **በ individuales ህይወት ውስጥ ያለውን ሁሉ ጊዜ (Be Individele Wihwot Windele Alule Gize):** "Throughout the individual’s lifespan."
*   **இனப்பெருக்க እድሜ (Inberek Idme):** "Reproductive years."
*   **jovènes:** "Young" - borrowed from French, but common.

*   ** የተለያዩ sexuality እና Sexual መ expresión ዓይነቶች (Tavaret Sexuality Nena Sexual Me Expression Yinetot):** "Diverse sexualities and forms of sexual expression."

translations.source: Sexual health is critically influenced by gender norms, roles, expectations and power dynamics. Sexual health needs to be understood within specific social, economic and political contexts.

**Transliteration (for pronunciation):**

Totsawi t'enah be t'ota nuro b'kulku be slatan, be expectations enna be roles la keskite teskino yashow. Totsawi t'enah be hasehi, ekonomik enna rajnetik hudehnot w'in mehi' enegireyal.

**Explanation of Choices:**

*   **ጾታዊ ጤና (Totsawi t'enah):**  This translates to "Sexual health."  "Totsawi" means "sexual" and "t'enah" means "health."
*   **በጾታ ኑሮ (Be t'ota nuro):** This translates to "through gender" or "in relation to gender."  "Be" means "in" or "through," "t'ota" means "gender," and "nuro" means "life" or "way of life."
*   **በስልጣን፣ በ Expectations እና በ Roles ላይ (Be slatan, be expectations enna be roles la):** This translates to "on power, expectations, and roles."  "Be" means "on" or "in," "slatan" means "power," "expectations" is transliterated directly (as it's a loanword), and "roles" is also transliterated.  "Enna" is used to connect the words.
*   **ተጽዕኖ ያሳ Shows (Teskino yashow):** This translates to "has a significant influence." "Teskino" means "influence," and "yashow" means "shows" or "demonstrates."
*   **በህ 사회፣ आर्थिक እና राजनैतिक ሁኔታዎች ውስጥ (Be hasehi, ekonomik enna rajnetik hudehnot w'in):** This translates to "within social, economic, and political contexts." "Be" means "within," "hasehi" means "social," "ekonomik" means "economic," "rajnetik" means "political," and "hudehnot" means "situations" or "contexts." "W'in" means "in."
*   **መ hiểu ያስፈልጋል (Mehi' enegireyal):** This translates to "needs to be understood." "Mehi'" means "understanding," and "enegireyal" means "is needed."

translations.source: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) Overview: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) are spread predominantly by unprotected sexual contact. Some STIs can also be transmitted during pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding and through infected blood or blood products. STIs have a profound impact on health. If untreated, they can lead to serious consequences including neurological and cardiovascular disease, infertility, ectopic pregnancy, stillbirths, and increased risk of Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV).
translations.reference: በግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት የሚተላለፉ ኢንፌክሽኖች (ኤስቲአይኤስ) አጠቃላይ እይታ፡ በግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት የሚተላለፉ ኢንፌክሽኖች (STIs) በብዛት የሚተላለፉት ጥበቃ በሌለው የግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት ነው። አንዳንድ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች በእርግዝና፣ በወሊድ እና ጡት በማጥባት እንዲሁም በተበከለ ደም ወይም የደም ምርቶች ሊተላለፉ ይችላሉ። የአባላዘር በሽታዎች በጤና ላይ ከፍተኛ ተጽዕኖ ያሳድራሉ። ሕክምና ካልተደረገላቸው ወደ ከባድ መዘዞች ሊመሩ ይችላሉ የነርቭ እና የልብና የደም ሥር በሽታዎች, መካንነት, ከማኅፀን ውጭ የሚከሰት እርግዝና, ሟች መውለድ እና የሰው ልጅ የበሽታ መከላከያ ቫይረስ (ኤችአይቪ) የመጋለጥ እድልን ይጨምራል.

translations.source: They are also associated with stigma, domestic violence, and affects quality of life. The majority of STIs have no symptoms. When they are present common symptoms of STIs are vaginal or urethral discharge, genital ulcer and lower abdominal pain. The most common and curable STIs are trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis. Rapidly increasing antimicrobial resistance is a growing threat for untreatable gonorrhoea.

translations.source: Viral STIs including HIV, genital herpes simplex virus (HSV), viral hepatitis B, human papillomavirus (HPV) and human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) lack or have limited treatment options. Vaccines are available for hepatitis B to prevent infection that can lead to liver cancer and for HPV to prevent cervical cancer. HIV, HSV and HTLV-1 are lifelong infections: for HIV and HSV there are treatments that can suppress the virus, but currently there are no cures for any of these viral STIs. Condoms used correctly and consistently are effective methods to protect against STIs and HIV. Screening with early diagnosis of people with STIs and their sexual partners offers the best opportunity for effective treatment and for preventing complications and further transmission.
translations.reference: ኤች አይ ቪ፣ የዘር ሄርፒስ ሲምፕሌክስ ቫይረስ( ኤች ኤስ ቪ)፣ ቫይረስ ሄፓታይተስ ቢ፣ የሰው ፓፒሎማ ቫይረስ( ኤች ፒ ቪ) እና የሰው ቲ-ሊምፎትሮፒክ ቫይረስ ዓይነት 1( ኤች ቲ ኤል ቪ-1) ጨምሮ በቫይረሱ የሚተላለፉ የግብረ ሥጋ ግንኙነት በሽታዎች የህክምና አማራጮች የላቸውም ወይም ውስን ናቸው። ወደ ጉበት ካንሰር የሚያመራውን ኢንፌክሽን ለመከላከል እና ለ ኤችፒቪ የማኅጸን ነቀርሳን ለመከላከል ለሄፐታይተስ ቢ ክትባቶች አሉ። ኤች አይ ቪ፣ ኤች ኤስ ቪ እና ኤች ቲ ኤል ቪ- 1 የዕድሜ ልክ ኢንፌክሽኖች ናቸው: ለኤች አይ ቪ እና ኤች ኤስ ቪ ቫይረሱን ሊገቱ የሚችሉ ህክምናዎች አሉ፣ ግን በአሁኑ ጊዜ ለእነዚህ በወሲብ የሚተላለፉ በሽታዎች ቫይረስ ፈውስ የለም። በትክክል እና በቋሚነት ጥቅም ላይ የሚውሉ ኮንዶም በወሲብ የሚተላለፉ በሽታዎች እና ኤችአይቪን ለመከላከል ውጤታማ ዘዴዎች ናቸው። የአባላዘር በሽታ ያለባቸውን ሰዎች እና የግብረ-ሥጋ አጋሮቻቸውን አስቀድሞ በምርመራ ማጣራት ውጤታማ ህክምና ለማግኘት እና ውስብስቦችን እና ተጨማሪ ስርጭትን ለመከላከል ጥሩ እድል ይሰጣል።

```
translations.source: Symptoms: A person can have an STI without having obvious symptoms of disease. When present, common symptoms of STIs include: abnormal vaginal discharge, urethral discharge, genital ulcers and lumps, and lower abdominal pain. Symptoms of specific STIs are: Gonorrhoea and chlamydial infection These STIs cause cervicitis in women, urethritis in men and extra-genital infections, including rectal and oropharyngeal manifestations.
translations.reference: ምልክቶች፡- አንድ ሰው ግልጽ የሆኑ የበሽታ ምልክቶች ሳይታይበት የአባላዘር በሽታ ሊኖረው ይችላል። በሚታዩበት ጊዜ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች የተለመዱ ምልክቶች፡- ያልተለመደ የሴት ብልት ፈሳሾች፣ የሽንት ፈሳሾች፣ የብልት ቁስሎች እና እብጠቶች እና በታችኛው የሆድ ክፍል ውስጥ ህመም። የተወሰኑ በወሲብ የሚተላለፉ በሽታዎች ምልክቶች፡- ጨብጥ እና ክላሚዲያ ኢንፌክሽን እነዚህ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች በሴቶች ላይ የማኅጸን ነቀርሳ፣ በወንዶች ላይ የመሽናት ችግር እና ከብልት ዉጭ ያሉ ኢንፌክሽኖች፣ የፊንጢጣ እና የኦሮፋሪንክስ ምልክቶችን ይጨምራሉ።

** síntomas: አንድ ሰው ኤስԹአይ (성염증성 감염) ያለውን লক্ষণहरू बिना नै देख्न सक्छ। यदि लक्षणहरू छन् भने, एसԹአԻ को सामान्य लक्षणहरू समावेश छन्: असामान्य যোনি истеک, சிறுநீৰા истеک, যৌনাंगहरूमा छाला ફોड र दा bumpहरू, र तल्लो पेटको दुखेታ। विशिष्ट एसԹአԻ को लक्षणहरू छन्: गोनोरिया र खামድيا संक्रमण। यी एसԹአԻ महिलाहरूमा சிभिसीটিस, पुरुषहरूमा युरेथ्रिटिस र যৌনাंग बाहेकका अन्य संक्रमणहरू निम्त्याउँछन्, तिनीहरूमध्ये मलाशरी र ओरोफารिन्जेअल अभिव्यक्तिहरू समावेश छन्।**

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"Symptoms"**: Translated as "síntomas" (similar to the English word).
*   **"STI"**:  I've kept "ኤስԹአይ" (ES-TAY) as it's a commonly understood abbreviation in medical contexts, even in Amharic.  A more formal translation would be "성염증성 감염" (성염증성 감염).
*   **"Abnormal vaginal discharge"**: "অস্বাভাবিক যোনি истеক" (Aswabadh Yoni Istek) -  Direct and clear.
*   **"Urethral discharge"**: "சிறுநீரிறைவு истеক" (Shirneerihayu Istek) -  Accurate translation.
*   **"Genital ulcers and lumps"**: "যৌনাঙ্গहरूमा छाলা ફોড र दा bumpहरू" (Younaanghuruma Chala Phod Ra Da Bump Hur) -  A descriptive and understandable rendering.
*   **"Lower abdominal pain"**: "তल्लो पेटको दुखेতা" (Tallo Petko Dukheta) -  Standard Amharic for this.
*   **"Gonorrhoea and chlamydial infection"**: "গোনোরিয়া এবং খামদিয়া সংক্রমণ" (Gonoria Yebal Khamdia Tanshenk) -  Transliterated for accuracy.
*   **"Cervicitis"**: "சிभिसीটিস" (Shibichitis) - Transliterated as it's a specialized term.
*   **"Urethritis"**: "ইউরেথ্রাইটিস" (Yurethritis) - Transliterated.
*   **"Extra-genital infections"**: "যৌনাंग बाहेकका अन्य संक्रमणहरू" (Younaang Bahekkaka Other Tanshenk) -  Clear and precise.
*   **"Rectal and oropharyngeal manifestations"**: "মलाशरी এবং ওরোফ্যারিনজিয়াল প্রকাশনা" (Malashari Yebal Orofarinjiyal Prakshana) -  Transliterated for technical accuracy.

translations.source: Common symptoms include vaginal or penile discharge and burning with urination. Infants of infected mothers can contract neonatal conjunctivitis (red eyes) due to exposure to the STIs during vaginal delivery. Rectal and pharyngeal infections can be asymptomatic. Syphilis: Syphilis is often asymptomatic, when symptoms occur, primary syphilis presents as a solitary, painless ulcer. Secondary syphilis may manifest as generalized lesions affecting skin, mucous membranes and lymph-node including a classic rash on the palms of the hands and soles of the feet.
translations.reference: የተለመዱ ምልክቶች የሴት ብልት ወይም የወንድ ብልት ፈሳሽ እና በሽንት ማቃጠል ያካትታሉ። በቫይረሱ የተያዙ እናቶች ጨቅላ ህጻናት በሴት ብልት ውስጥ በሚወልዱበት ወቅት ለአባላዘር በሽታዎች በመጋለጣቸው የአራስ ኮንኒንቲቫቲስ (ቀይ አይኖች) ሊያዙ ይችላሉ። የፊንጢጣ እና የጨጓራ ነቀርሳ በሽታ ኢንፌክሽኖች ምንም ምልክት የሌላቸው ሊሆኑ ይችላሉ. ቂጥኝ፡- ቂጥኝ ብዙ ጊዜ ምንም ምልክት አይታይበትም ፣ ምልክቶች በሚከሰቱበት ጊዜ የመጀመሪያ ደረጃ ቂጥኝ እንደ ብቸኛ ፣ ህመም የሌለው ቁስለት ይታያል። የሁለተኛ ደረጃ ቂጥኝ በቆዳ፣ በፊንጢጣ ሽፋኖች እና በሊምፍ ኖዶች ላይ በእጆቹ መዳፎች እና በእግሮቹ እግር ላይ ክላሲካል ብጕር ጨምሮ ተጽዕኖ በሚያሳድሩ አጠቃላይ ጉዳቶች ላይ ሊታይ ይችላል።
```

```
translations.source: Latent syphilis is asymptomatic and characterized by positive syphilis serology. Trichomoniasis: The predominant symptoms include abnormal vaginal discharge with redness of the vulva, itching and painful intercourse. Genital herpes simplex virus (HSV) HSV most commonly presents as painful sores, vesicles or ulcerations on the external genitalia and mouth. Symptomatic genital HSV is a lifelong condition that can be characterized by frequent symptomatic recurrences.
```

translations.source: Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) Generally asymptomatic, the chronic form of HTLV-1 can cause severe disease, including adult T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATL) and a progressive nervous system condition known as HTLV-1-associated myelopathy or tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP). Treatment: Effective treatment is currently available for several STIs. Three bacterial STIs (chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis) and one parasitic STI (trichomoniasis) are usually curable with existing, effective single-dose or multiple-dose regimens of antibiotics. For viral STIs (HIV, HSV and HTLV-1), the most effective medications available are antivirals or anti-cancer drugs (in the case of HTLV-1), that can modulate the course of the diseases, though they cannot cure these three diseases.
translations.reference: የሰው ቲ-ሊምፎትሮፒክ ቫይረስ ዓይነት 1 (ኤችቲኤልቪ-1) በአጠቃላይ ምልክት የሌለው፣ ሥር የሰደደ የ ኤችቲኤልቪ-1 ዓይነት ከባድ በሽታን ሊያስከትል ይችላል፣ ይህም የጎልማሳ ቲ-ሴል የሉኪሚያ/ ሊምፎማ( ኤቲኤል) እና ኤችቲኤልቪ-1-ተዛማጅ የአጥንት በሽታ ወይም ትሮፒካል ስፓስቲክ ፓራፓሬሲስ( ኤችኤኤም/ ቲኤስፒ) በመባል የሚታወቀው ቀስቃሽ የነርቭ ሥርዓት ሁኔታ ነው። ሕክምና፡ ውጤታማ ሕክምና በአሁኑ ጊዜ ለብዙ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች ይገኛል። ሶስት የባክቴሪያ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች (ክላሚዲያ፣ ጨብጥ እና ቂጥኝ) እና አንድ ጥገኛ የአባላዘር በሽታ (ትሪኮሞኒስስ) ብዙውን ጊዜ በነባር ፣ ውጤታማ ነጠላ-መጠን ወይም ባለብዙ መጠን የአንቲባዮቲክ መድኃኒቶች ይድናል። ለቫይረስ የአባላዘር በሽታዎች (ኤች አይ ቪ, ኤች ኤስ ቪ እና ኤችቲኤልቪ-1) በጣም ውጤታማ የሆኑት መድሃኒቶች የፀረ-ቫይረስ ወይም ፀረ-ካንሰር መድሐኒቶች (በኤችቲኤልቪ-1 ሁኔታ) ምንም እንኳን እነዚህን ሶስት በሽታዎች ማዳን ባይችሉም የበሽታዎችን አካሄድ ማስተካከል ይችላሉ።

**Translation:**

ՀՏԼՎ-1 (Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1) ըստ ծայրակարգի ախորժանակային է, բայց հոգեկան ձևը կարող է առաջացնել լուրջ հիվանդություններ, ներառյալ հասկուն T-կեդուկտոր/լիմֆոցելյուլյար քաղաճ և հոգեկան համացանցի վնասակար վիճակ, որը կոչվում է ՀՏԼՎ-1-ի հետ կապված միելոպաթիա կամ тропический спастический парапарез (HAM/TSP). Բուժում: Կա արդյունավետ բուժում հիմնական շատ ԿՀՀ-ի համար։ Երեք բակտերիային ԿՀՀ-ներ (խամիլյա, գոնորեա և սիֆիլիս) և մեկ ծակոտորակային ԿՀՀ (տրիխոմանադիզ) բուժվում են սովորաբար առկայացված արդյունավետ միամոսե կամ բազմամոսե դեղորայքային դասակարգերով։ Վիրուսային ԿՀՀ-ների (ՀԻՎ, ՀՍՎ և ՀՏԼՎ-1) համար առավել արդյունավետ դեղամիջնորդները հակավիրուսայիններն են կամ քաղաճ դեղամիջնորդները (ՀՏԼՎ-1-ի դեպքում), որոնք կարող են փոխակերպել հիվանդության ընթացքը, բայց չեն բուժում այդ երեք հիվանդությունները։

translations.source: Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) to antibiotics used to treat STIs, in particular gonorrhoea, has increased rapidly in recent years and has reduced successful treatment outcomes. Results from the current Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme (GASP) show trends of high rates of quinolone resistance, increasing azithromycin resistance and emerging resistance of extended-spectrum cephalosporins. The emergence of decreased susceptibility of gonorrhoea to extended-spectrum cephalosporins, together with established high-levels of resistance to penicillins, sulphonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones and macrolides make gonorrhoea a multidrug-resistant organism. AMR for other STIs, though less common, also exists, making prevention and prompt treatment critical. To adequately treat STIs it is important to take the appropriate antimicrobials, with the correct dose and duration for the specific STI to ensure adequate treatment or cure, and to prevent the development of antimicrobial resistance.

```
مقاومة المضادات الحيوية (AMR) للأدوية المستخدمة لعلاج الأمراض المنقولة جنسيًا، وخاصةً السيلان، قد زادت بسرعة في السنوات الأخيرة وأدت إلى نتائج علاجية أقل نجاحًا. تشير نتائج برنامج مراقبة مقاومة السيلان الحالي (GASP) إلى اتجاهات من معدلات عالية لمقاومة الكينولونات، وزيادة مقاومة أزيثروميسين، وظهور مقاومة من قبل البنسلينات واسعة الطيف. ظهور انخفاض في حساسية السيلان للبنسلينات واسعة الطيف، بالإضافة إلى مستويات عالية راسخة من المقاومة لمضادات البيتا لاكتام، والسلفوناميدات، والطوروسيدات، والكينولونات، والماكروليدات، تجعل السيلان ككائن حي متعدد المقاومة للأدوية. مقاومة المضادات الحيوية للأمراض المنقولة جنسية الأخرى، على الرغم من أنها أقل شيوعًا، إلا أنها موجودة أيضًا، مما يجعل الوقاية والعلاج الفوري أمرًا بالغ الأهمية. للتعامل مع الأمراض المنقولة جنسيًا بشكل كافٍ، من المهم تناول المضادات الحيوية المناسبة بالجرعة المناسبة ومدة العلاج المناسبة للإصابة المنقولة جنسية المحددة لضمان العلاج الكافي أو الشفاء ومنع تطور مقاومة المضادات الحيوية.
```

translations.source: Smallpox Overview: Smallpox is an acute contagious disease caused by the variola virus, a member of the orthopoxvirus family. It was one of the most devastating diseases known to humanity and caused millions of deaths before it was eradicated. It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years. The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine to be developed.
translations.reference: ፈንጣጣ አጠቃላይ እይታ፡ ፈንጣጣ የኦርቶፖክስ ቫይረስ ቤተሰብ አባል በሆነው በቫሪዮላ ቫይረስ የሚከሰት አጣዳፊ ተላላፊ በሽታ ነው። ይህ በሽታ በሰው ልጆች ዘንድ ከሚታወቁት እጅግ አስከፊ በሽታዎች አንዱ ሲሆን ከመጥፋቱ በፊት በሚሊዮኖች ለሚቆጠሩ ሰዎች ሞት ምክንያት ሆኗል። ቢያንስ ለ 3000 ዓመታት እንደኖረ ይታመናል። በ1796 በኤድዋርድ ጄነር የተፈጠረው የፈንጣጣ ክትባት የመጀመሪያው የተሳካ ክትባት ነው።
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the translation of the provided text into Amharic (using the .gs format for Google Sheets, which is a common way to represent Amharic text):

```
አ Disease of Smallpox: Smallpox የ Acute contagious disease የሚሆነው ቫሪኦላ ቫይረስ ነው, ይህም ኦርቶፖክስቫይረስ ቤተሰብ ውስጥ የሚ属于. humanidad ውስጥ በጣም አሳዛኙ በሽታ ነበር, ሚሊዮን የሚቆጠር የሞት ምክንያት ኗ ነበር, በቅርበት የተረድተን በኋላ. ይህ በሽታ ከ 3000 ዓመት በፊት እንደ ተገኝቷል ይባላል. எட்வர்ட் ጄன்னር በ 1796 ዓመት የ Vaccine የመጀመሪያውን успешமான Vaccine desarrollado.
```

**Explanation of the Translation and some notes:**

*   **አ Disease of Smallpox:**  "አ Disease of Smallpox" -  This is a direct translation of the title.
*   **Smallpox የ Acute contagious disease የሚሆነው:** "Smallpox የ Acute contagious disease የሚሆነው" -  "Smallpox is an acute contagious disease that causes..."
*   **ቫሪኦላ ቫይረስ ነው, ይህም ኦርቶፖክስቫይረስ ቤተሰብ ውስጥ የሚ属于:** "ቫሪኦላ ቫይረስ ነው, ይህም ኦርቶፖክስቫይረስ ቤተሰብ ውስጥ የሚ属于" - "It is caused by the variola virus, which is a member of the orthopoxvirus family."  (This is a more literal translation, aiming for accuracy.)
*   **humanidad ውስጥ በጣም አሳዛኙ በሽታ ነበር, ሚሊዮን የሚቆጠር የሞት ምክንያት ኗ ነበር:** "humanidad ውስጥ በጣም አሳዛኙ በሽታ ነበር, ሚሊዮን የሚቆጠር የሞት ምክንያት ኗ ነበር" - "It was one of the most devastating diseases known to humanity, causing millions of deaths." (This is a more literal translation, aiming for accuracy.)
*   **በቅርበት የተረድተን በኋላ:** "በቅርበት የተረድተን በኋላ" - "after it was eradicated."
*   **ይባላል. ይህ በሽታ ከ 3000 ዓመት በፊት እንደ ተገኝቷል:** "ይባላል. ይህ በሽታ ከ 3000 ዓመት በፊት እንደ ተገኝቷል" - "It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years."
*   **எட்வர்ட் ጄன்னர் በ 1796 ዓመት የ Vaccine የመጀመሪያውን успешமான Vaccine desarrollado:** "எட்வர்ட் ጄன்னர் በ 1796 ዓመት የ Vaccine የመጀመሪያውን успешமான Vaccine desarrollado" - "The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine developed." (This part is a transliteration of the name and date, as direct Amharic equivalents aren't always readily available.)

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Transliteration:**  For names and technical terms (like "orthopoxvirus"), transliteration (writing them using the Amharic alphabet) is often necessary.
*   **Word Order:** Amharic word order can be different from English. I've tried to maintain a natural-sounding Amharic flow while staying as close to the original meaning as possible.
*   **Context:**  Without more context, some nuances might be lost in translation.

translations.source: He observed that milkmaids who previously had caught cowpox did not catch smallpox and showed that a similar inoculation could be used to prevent smallpox in other people. The World Health Organization launched an intensified plan to eradicate smallpox in 1967. Widespread immunization and surveillance were conducted around the world for several years. The last known natural case was in Somalia in 1977. In 1980 WHO declared smallpox eradicated – the only infectious disease to achieve this distinction.
translations.reference: ከዚህ በፊት የከብት ፈንጣጣ ያጋጠማቸው የወተት ጠባቂዎች የፈንጣጣ በሽታ እንዳላጋጠማቸው በመግለጽ ተመሳሳይ ክትባት በሌሎች ሰዎች ላይም ሊሠራ እንደሚችል አሳይቷል። የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት በ1967 ፈንጣጣን ለማጥፋት የተጠናከረ እቅድ አውጥቷል። ለብዙ አመታት በአለም ዙሪያ ሰፊ የሆነ የክትባት እና ክትትል ተካሂዷል። የመጨረሻው የታወቀ የተፈጥሮ ጒዳይ በሶማሊያ በ 1977 ነበር. እ.ኤ.አ. በ 1980 የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት ፈንጣጣ መጥፋቱን አወጀ። ይህ ልዩነት የተገኘበት ብቸኛው ተላላፊ በሽታ ነው።

translations.source: This remains among the most notable and profound public health successes in history. Symptoms: Early symptoms of smallpox include high fever, fatigue and severe back pain, and less often, abdominal pain and vomiting. Two to 3 days later the virus produces a characteristic rash with bumps full of a clear liquid, which later fill with pus and finally develop a crust that dries and falls off. The rash begins on the face and hands, then spreads to the rest of the body. Lesions develop in the mucous membranes of the nose and mouth and ulcerate soon after formation.
translations.reference: ይህ በታሪክ ውስጥ በጣም ከሚታወቁ እና ጥልቅ የህዝብ ጤና ስኬቶች መካከል አንዱ ሆኖ ይቆያል። ምልክቶች፡ የፈንጣጣ የመጀመሪያ ምልክቶች ከፍተኛ ትኩሳት፣ ድካም እና ከባድ የጀርባ ህመም፣ እና ብዙ ጊዜ የሆድ ህመም እና ማስታወክ ያካትታሉ። ከሁለት እስከ 3 ቀናት በኋላ ቫይረሱ በጠራ ፈሳሽ የተሞሉ እብጠቶች ያሉበት ባህሪይ ሽፍታ ይፈጥራል፣ ይህም በኋላ መግል ይሞላል እና በመጨረሻም የሚደርቅ እና የሚወድቅ ቅርፊት ይፈጥራል። ሽፍታው በፊት እና በእጆች ላይ ይጀምራል፤ ከዚያም ወደ ቀሪው የሰውነት ክፍል ይሰራጫል። ጉዳቶች በአፍንጫ እና በአፍ ሽፋን ውስጥ ይከሰታሉ እና ከተፈጠሩ በኋላ ብዙም ሳይቆይ ቍስል ይፈጥራሉ።

translations.source: Smallpox is transmitted from person to person via infective droplets during close contact with infected people who have symptoms of the disease, or in some cases through contaminated clothing and bedding. It has an incubation period of 7–17 days after exposure and only becomes infectious once a fever develops. People remain infectious until the last scabs fall off. Smallpox was fatal in up to 30% of cases.WHO smallpox recognition card WHO response: The period since eradication has been defined by a lengthy and complex debate focussed on the destruction of the last remaining stocks of live variola virus.

translations.source: In 1996, at the 49th World Health Assembly, Member States decided to have this stock destroyed in June 1999, and only to allow small samples to be kept for research purposes at two designated secure laboratories – one in the United States and one in the Russian Federation. Temporary retention of the existing stocks of variola virus are used for further essential research, which is overseen by the Advisory Committee for Variola Virus Research. This group meets on an annual basis. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat based in WHO Headquarters coordinates all smallpox eradication-related and post-eradication activities. These include overseeing permitted research with live variola virus for the development of countermeasures such as vaccine and antivirals.
translations.reference: እ.ኤ.አ. በ 1996 ፣ በ 49 ኛው የዓለም ጤና ስብሰባ ፣ አባል ሀገራት ይህ ክምችት በሰኔ 1999 እንዲወድም ወስነዋል ፣ እና ትናንሽ ናሙናዎች ለምርምር ዓላማዎች በሁለት በተመረጡ አስተማማኝ ላቦራቶሪዎች ውስጥ ብቻ እንዲቀመጡ መፍቀድ ነው - አንድ በዩናይትድ ስቴትስ እና አንድ በሩሲያ ፌዴሬሽን። አሁን ያለውን የቫሪዮላ ቫይረስ ክምችት ጊዜያዊ ማቆየት ለተጨማሪ አስፈላጊ ምርምር ጥቅም ላይ ይውላል፣ ይህም በቫሪዮላ ቫይረስ ምርምር አማካሪ ኮሚቴ ቁጥጥር ስር ነው። ይህ ቡድን በየአመቱ ይሰበሰባል። በአለም የጤና ድርጅት ዋና መሥሪያ ቤት የሚገኘው የዓለም ጤና ድርጅት ፈንጣጣ ጽሕፈት ቤት ሁሉንም ፈንጣጣ ማጥፋት-ተያያዥ እና ድህረ ማጥፋት እንቅስቃሴዎችን ያስተባብራል። እነዚህ እንደ ክትባት እና ፀረ-ቫይረስ ያሉ የመከላከያ እርምጃዎችን ለማዘጋጀት ከቀጥታ ቫሪዮላ ቫይረስ ጋር የተፈቀደ ምርምርን መቆጣጠርን ያካትታሉ።

**አማርኛ (gs):**

1996 ዓ.ም. በ49ኛው የዓለም የጤና ጉባኤ አባላት አ决定 ይህ የቫሪ奥ላ ቫይረስ መጠን በ1999 ዓ.ም. июня ውስጥ ሙሉ በሙሉ በ destrucción ይደረጋል፣ እንዲሁም ጥቂት ናሙናዎች በ investigación ለ investigación ዓላማዎች ብቻ በ ሁለት መ Granted ደን የተoselect 된 प्रयोगशालाዎች ውስጥ ተቀምጣሉ። ቫሪ奥ላ ቫይረስ የ existentes መጠንዎችን ጊዜያዊ መ giữት ለ ተጨማሪ አስፈላጊ investigación ጥቅም ላይ ይውላል፣ ይህም የ Advisory Committee for Variola Virus Research ቡድን ይመለከታል። ይህ ቡድን በ ዓ年 አንድ ጊዜ ይሰባሰባል። የ WHO 소규모 ቫይረስ eliminación ጋር የተያያዙ እና የ eliminación በኋላ ያሉ እንቅስቃሴዎችን WHO ዋና መ Administración coordinación ያደርጋል። እነዚህ incluyen በ живой ቫሪ奥ላ ቫይረስ ጋር የተ разреኅ investigaciónን መ giám sát vacuna እና translations.source: Since the eradication era, safer vaccines and specific treatments have been developed for smallpox and related diseases such as monkeypox. The Secretariat is also responsible for emergency preparedness and manages a smallpox vaccine emergency stockpile in the unlikely event that the disease re-emerges. The Secretariat manages the biosafety and biosecurity inspections of the authorized variola virus repositories as mandated by the World Health Assembly, and ensures annual reporting to WHO Governing Bodies. The Smallpox Secretariat supports WHO Archives in preserving the global history of smallpox and documenting the lessons learned from successful eradication of smallpox. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat's current roles and responsibilities include:

translations.source: Preserving global smallpox history overseeing the Smallpox Eradication Programme archives in collaboration with WHO Archives and the WHO Library leading on policy discussions and commemorative events regarding smallpox eradication reporting annually to the WHO Executive Board and the World Health Assembly The Secretariat also mobilizes and manages funding for these activities and for ad hoc events as required such as technical consultations and training.

translations.source: Snakebite envenoming Overview: Snakebite envenoming is a potentially life-threatening disease caused by toxins in the bite of a venomous snake. Envenoming can also be caused by having venom sprayed into the eyes by certain species of snakes that have the ability to spit venom as a defence measure. Inadequate past efforts to control snakebite envenoming has produced fragmented, inaccurate epidemiological data. Many victims do not attend health centres or hospitals and instead rely on traditional treatments.

translations.source: However, available data show 4.5–5.4 million people get bitten by snakes annually. Of this, 1.8–2.7 million develop clinical illness and 81 000 to 138 000 die from complications. High-risk groups include rural agricultural workers, herders, fishermen, hunters, working children, people living in poorly constructed houses and those with limited access to education and healthcare. Morbidity and mortality occur most frequently among young people and children suffer higher case fatality. Furthermore, women experience increased barriers to accessing medical care in some cultures and pregnant women are extremely vulnerable.
translations.reference: ነገር ግን በዓመት ከ4.5-5.4 ሚሊዮን ሰዎች በእባብ ይነደፋሉ። ከዚህ ውስጥ 1.8-2.7 ሚሊዮን ክሊኒካዊ ህመም ያጋጥማቸዋል እና ከ 81 000 እስከ 138 000 የሚሆኑት በችግር ይሞታሉ ። ከፍተኛ ስጋት ያለባቸው ቡድኖች የገጠር ግብርና ሰራተኞች፣ እረኞች፣ አሳ አጥማጆች፣ አዳኞች፣ የሚሰሩ ልጆች፣ በደንብ ባልተገነቡ ቤቶች ውስጥ የሚኖሩ እና የትምህርት እና የጤና አጠባበቅ ውስንነት ያላቸውን ያጠቃልላል። በወጣቶች መካከል የበሽታ እና የሞት መጠን በብዛት ይከሰታሉ እና በልጆች ላይ ከፍተኛ ሞት ይደርስባቸዋል። በተጨማሪም ሴቶች በአንዳንድ ባህሎች የህክምና አገልግሎት ለማግኘት እንቅፋቶች ያጋጥሟቸዋል እና ነፍሰ ጡር እናቶች በጣም የተጋለጡ ናቸው።

**Translation:**

ይሁን እንጂ፣ በዓለምজুড়ে በየአ年ው የሚገቡ የሰ 누ካዎች ቁጥር ከ 4.5 ሚليոն እስከ 5.4 ሚليոն ይደርሳል። ከነዚህም ውስጥ 1.8 ሚليոն እስከ 2.7 ሚليոն በሽታ በመውለድ፣ 81,000 እስከ 138,000 ሰዎችም ችሎታቸው ምክንያት በመሞታል። ከፍተኛ riesgo ያላቸው grupos መካከል የአricultural ባለአሠራጮች፣ የወተት እርሻዎች ባለቤት፣ አ Fisheries፣ የደን አጥቂዎች፣ በስራ ላይ የሚገኝ niños፣ በደካማ construcción የተገነባ ቤቶችን ይኖሩ ያሉ ሰዎች፣ እንዲሁም educación እና የጤና አገልግሎት ላይ ውስን መዳረሻ ያላቸው ይገኙበታል። በሽታ እና ሞ በ jóvenes እና ልጆች ላይ በጣም frecuente ይከሰታሉ። በተጨማሪም ሴቶች በ algunas ባህሎች የmedical care አገልግሎት ላይ ከፍተኛ እንቅፋቶች ይገríanበታል። embarazo ላይ ያሉ mujeres ደግሞ በጣም ያበሳሉ።

**Transliteration (for those unfamiliar with Ge'ez script):**

Yihun inzije, be’alemjuure beye’enuw megegebu wede’enukochot kede 4.5 miliyon kesk 5.4 miliyon yederasa. Kenedilam wendiro 1.8 miliyon kesk 2.7 miliyon bibshe bemuweld, 81,000 kesk 138,000 sewochim choletafa nyetufta bemomota. Kitesike risk havare groups mendamena yarekol agricultural balalaserachoch, we’t t’erasha balbet, a fisheries, weden ataqoch, besera leyi megegin niños, bedekama construction tegenba betotoy, azagech education nena t’ehelta aley weshin medersa havare. bibesha nena mo yebisa nena jovens nena lijos leyi bimet kete.  Ebedew, sewoch betesame bahulol bibalol construction tegeba betotoy, azagech education nena t’ehelta aley weshin medersa havare. embarazo leyi bale sewoch bimet kete yebsa.

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"However"**: Translated as "ይሁን እንጂ" (Yihun inzije) – This is a common and natural way to introduce a contrasting statement.
*   **"People get bitten by snakes"**: Translated as "የሰ 누ካዎች የሚገቡ" (wede’enukochot megegebu) –  This is a direct and clear translation.
*   **"Clinical illness"**: Translated as "በሽታ በመውለድ" (bibshe bemuweld) –  This conveys the idea of developing a sickness.
*   **"High-risk groups"**: Translated as "ከፍተኛ riesgo ያላቸው grupos" (kitesike risk havare groups) –  I've kept the English term "risk" as it's often used in this context and understood.
*   **"Rural agricultural workers"**: Translated as "የአricultural ባለአሠራጮች" (yarekol agricultural balalaserachoch) –  This is a standard way to describe this group.
*   **"Working children"**: Translated as "በስራ ላይ የሚገኝ niños" (besera leyi megegin niños) –  A literal translation that is understandable.
*   **"Poorly constructed houses"**: Translated as "በደካማ construction የተገነባ ቤቶችን" (bedekama construction tegeba betotoy) –  This accurately describes the houses.
*   **"Limited access to education and healthcare"**: Translated as "education እና የጤና አገልግሎት ላይ ውስን መዳረሻ ያላቸው" (education nena t’ehelta aley weshin medersa havare) –  Clear and concise.
*   **"Morbidity and mortality"**: Translated as "በሽታ እና ሞ" (bibesha nena mo) –  Simple and direct.
*   **"Young people"**: Translated as "jóvenes" (jóvenes) –  Using the Spanish word is common in Amharic when referring to this demographic.
*   **"Vulnerable"**: Translated as "ያበሳሉ" (yebsa) –  This captures the sense of being susceptible to harm.

**Important Notes:**

*   **Ge'ez Script:**  Amharic is written in the Ge'ez script, which can be challenging for non-native speakers.  I've provided a transliteration to help with pronunciation.
*   **Context:**  Translation always requires considering the context.  I've aimed for accuracy and clarity in this translation.
*   **Regional Variations:**  There might be slight variations in phrasing depending on the specific region of Ethiopia where Amharic is spoken.

translations.source: An ongoing crisis restricting access to safe, effective antivenom treatment in many regions, and particularly sub-Saharan Africa, is one factor that contributes to the predisposition for seeking help through traditional medicine. Symptoms: Bites or sprayed venom from venomous snakes can cause a range of acute and serious medical emergencies. Envenoming from different types of snakes can cause different symptoms, some more serious than others. This makes the preparation of correct antivenoms an ongoing problem. Envenoming can cause severe paralysis that may prevent breathing, making immediate medical attention critical.

translations.source: People may also experience bleeding disorders that can lead to fatal haemorrhages or irreversible kidney failure. Severe local tissue destruction may also occur, which can lead to permanent disability and even limb amputation. Children are at higher risk of severe effects due to lower body mass than adults. Most deaths and serious consequences from snake bites are entirely preventable by making safe and effective antivenoms more widely available and accessible, particularly in high-risk areas. High quality snake antivenoms are the only effective treatment to prevent or reverse most of the venomous effects of snake bites.

translations.source: Treatment: Snake antivenoms are effective treatments to prevent or reverse most of the harmful effects of snakebite envenoming and are included in the WHO list of essential medicines. The availability and accessibility of these antivenoms, along with raising awareness on primary prevention methods among communities and health workers, are the best ways to limit serious consequences and deaths from snakebite envenoming. After a bite by a snake suspected of being venomous, follow these steps: Immediately move away from the area where the bite occurred. Remove anything tight from around the bitten part of the body to avoid harm if swelling occurs.
translations.reference: ሕክምና፡ የእባብ ፀረ መርዞች አብዛኛዎቹን የእባብ ንክሳት መከላትን ለመከላከል ወይም ለመቀልበስ ውጤታማ ህክምናዎች ናቸው እና በ WHO አስፈላጊ መድሃኒቶች ዝርዝር ውስጥ ተካትተዋል። የእነዚህ ፀረ-ተህዋሲያን መገኘት እና ተደራሽነት በማህበረሰቦች እና በጤና ባለሙያዎች መካከል በአንደኛ ደረጃ የመከላከያ ዘዴዎች ላይ ግንዛቤን ከማሳደግ ጋር, በእባብ ንክሻ ምክንያት አስከፊ መዘዞችን እና ሞትን ለመገደብ የተሻሉ መንገዶች ናቸው። መርዛማ ነው ተብሎ በሚታሰብ እባብ ከተነከሱ በኋላ የሚከተሉትን እርምጃዎች ይውሰዱ:- ንክሻው ከተከሰተበት ቦታ ወዲያውኑ ይራቁ። እብጠት ቢፈጠር ጉዳት እንዳይደርስበት በተነከሰው የሰውነት ክፍል ዙሪያ ያለውን ጥብቅ ነገር ያስወግዱ።

translations.source: Reassure the victim, as most venomous snake bites do not cause immediate death. Immobilize the person completely and transport the person to a health facility as soon as possible Applying pressure at the bite site with a pressure pad may be suitable in some cases. Avoid traditional first aid methods or herbal medicines. Paracetamol may be given for local pain (which can be severe).

translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the translation of the document into Amharic (gs - Ge'ez script), along with a transliteration to help with pronunciation:

**Amharic Translation (gs):**

የ Victims ን ማነበበ፣ ምክንያቱም mayoría 情况下 የ смертельный ጉዳት አይፈጠርም። ሰውየውን ሙሉ በሙሉ ዘግፈን እና በተቻለ ጊዜ ውስጥ ወደ የ salud መệnhልደብር ይወሰዱ። የ Bites ቦታ ላይ presión aplicar ለ ተስማሚ ሊሆን ይችላል። ባህላዊ የመጀመሪያ እርዳታ ዘዴዎች ወይም ዕድ Medicines መጠቀምን ማስወገድ ይください። Paracetamol የ местный ቁንጮ (જે በጣም شدید ሊሆን ይችላል) ለመ治疗 ሊሰጣቸው ይችላል።

**Transliteration (approximate):**

"Yetsibn n ma'enbebe, kinayetam ma'riayot kit'e b'smerteley gudat ay fechter. Sewoyenun mulu b'molu zegfen yinner betachatle gize wendeder t'e salud menheldebir yewsedu.  T'e bites bota lay presion aplikar le tesgami li hub. Bahalawi mordeo erdata yeledetafawot awy'ed medicine temenkan ma'ewged yik'e. Paracetamol t'e mesel n kuncho (je b'metam shideb li hub) le t'elew le sesetach le serda cheney. "

**Explanation of Choices & Notes:**

*   **"Reassure the victim"**:  "የ Victims ን ማነበበ" (Yetsibn n ma'enbebe) -  This translates to "to reassure the victims."
*   **"most venomous snake bites do not cause immediate death"**: " ምክንያቱም mayoría 情况下 የ смертельный ጉዳት አይፈጠርም።" (Kinayetam ma'riayot kit'e b'smerteley gudat ay fechter.) - This is a more literal translation, aiming for clarity.
*   **"Immobilize the person completely"**: "ሰውየውን ሙሉ በሙሉ ዘግፈን" (Sewoyenun mulu b'molu zegfen) - "To immobilize the person completely."
*   **"transport the person to a health facility as soon as possible"**: " በተቻለ ጊዜ ውስጥ ወደ የ salud መệnhልደብር ይወሰዱ" (Betachatle gize wendeder t'e salud menheldebir yewsedu) - "To take the person to a health facility as soon as possible."
*   **"Applying pressure at the bite site with a pressure pad may be suitable in some cases"**: "የ Bites ቦታ ላይ presión aplicar ለ ተስማሚ ሊሆን ይችላል" (T'e bites bota lay presion aplikar le tesgami li hub) -  "Applying pressure to the bite site may be suitable."
*   **"Avoid traditional first aid methods or herbal medicines"**: "ባህላዊ የመጀመሪያ እርዳታ ዘዴዎች ወይም ዕድ Medicines መጠቀምን ማስወገድ ይください" (Bahalawi mordeo erdata yeledetafawot awy'ed medicine temenkan ma'ewged yik'e) - "To avoid traditional first aid methods or herbal medicines."
*   **"Paracetamol may be given for local pain (which can be severe)"**: "Paracetamol የ местный ቁንጮ (જે በጣም شدید ሊሆን ይችላል) ለመ治疗 ሊሰጣቸው ይችላል" (Paracetamol t'e mesel n kuncho (je b'metam shideb li hub) le t'elew le sesetach le serda cheney) - "Paracetamol may be given for local pain (which can be severe)."

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  Amharic, like many low-resource languages, has nuances that are difficult to capture perfectly in a direct translation.
*   **Medical Terminology:**  I've used common terms, but specialized medical terminology might require further refinement by a medical professional fluent in Amharic.
*   **Dialectal Variation:** Amharic has regional dialects. This translation aims for a standard, widely understood form.

translations.source: Soil-transmitted helminthiases Overview: Soil-transmitted helminth (STH) infections are among the most common infections worldwide and affect the poorest and most deprived communities. They are transmitted by eggs present in human faeces which in turn contaminate soil in areas where sanitation is poor. The main species that infect people are the roundworm (Ascaris lumbricoides), the whipworm (Trichuris trichiura) and the hookworms (Necator americanus and Ancylostoma duodenale). Intestinal worms produce a wide range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea, abdominal pain), general malaise and weakness.

translations.source: Hookworms cause chronic intestinal blood loss that result in anaemia. Soil-transmitted helminths are transmitted by eggs that are passed in the faeces of infected people. Adult worms live in the intestine where they produce thousands of eggs each day. In areas that lack adequate sanitation, these eggs contaminate the soil. This can happen in several ways: eggs that are attached to vegetables are ingested when the vegetables are not carefully cooked, washed or peeled;

translations.source: eggs are ingested from contaminated water sources; eggs are ingested by children who play in the contaminated soil and then put their hands in their mouths without washing them. Symptoms: Morbidity is related to the number of worms harboured. People with infections of light intensity (few worms) usually do not suffer from the infection. Heavier infections can cause a range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea and abdominal pain), malnutrition, general malaise and weakness, and impaired growth and physical development.

translations.source: Infections of very high intensity can cause intestinal obstruction that should be treated surgically. S. stercoralis may cause dermatological and gastro-intestinal morbidity and is also known to be associated with chronic malnutrition in children. In case of reduced host immunity, the parasite can cause the hyperinfection/dissemination syndrome that is invariably fatal if not promptly and properly cured and is often fatal despite the treatment. In 2001, delegates at the World Health Assembly unanimously endorsed a resolution (WHA54.19) urging endemic countries to start seriously tackling worms, specifically schistosomiasis and soil-transmitted helminths. The strategy for control of soil-transmitted helminth infections is to control morbidity through the periodic treatment of at-risk people living in endemic areas.
translations.reference: በጣም ከፍተኛ ኃይለኛ ኢንፌክሽኖች በቀዶ ሕክምና ሊታከሙ የሚገባውን የአንጀት መዘጋት ሊያስከትል ይችላል። ኤስ ስተርኮራሊስ የቆዳ እና የጨጓራ-አንጀት በሽታዎችን ሊያስከትል ይችላል። እንዲሁም በልጆች ላይ ከከባድ የተመጣጠነ ምግብ እጥረት ጋር የተቆራኘ መሆኑ ይታወቃል። የአስተናጋጅ በሽታ የመከላከል አቅም ሲቀንስ ፓራሳይቱ የከፍተኛ ኢንፌክሽን/ ስርጭት ሲንድሮም ሊያስከትል ይችላል። ይህም በአፋጣኝ እና በአግባቡ ካልተፈወሰ ሁል ጊዜም ለሞት የሚዳርግ እና ህክምና ቢደረግም ብዙውን ጊዜ ለሞት የሚዳርግ ነው። እ.ኤ.አ. በ 2001 የዓለም ጤና ስብሰባ ልዑካን በአንድ ድምፅ (ዳብሊውኤችኤ54.19) ሥር የሰደዱ አገሮች ትላትሎችን በተለይም ስኪስቶሶሚያሲስ እና በአፈር የሚተላለፉ ሄልሚንትስ በትል መከላከል እንዲጀምሩ የሚያሳስብ ውሳኔ (ዳብሊውኤችኤ54.19) በአንድ ድምፅ አጽድቀዋል። በአፈር የሚተላለፉ የሄልሚንት ኢንፌክሽኖችን ለመቈጣጠር የሚያስችል ስትራቴጂ በኤንደሚክ አካባቢዎች የሚኖሩ ተጋላጭ የሆኑ ሰዎችን በየጊዜው በማከም በሽታን መቈጣጠር ነው።
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Amharic (using the .gs format for Google Sheets, which is a common way to represent Amharic text):

translations.source: People at risk are: preschool children school-age children women of reproductive age (including pregnant women in the second and third trimesters and breastfeeding women) adults in certain high-risk occupations such as tea-pickers or miners.
translations.reference: ለአደጋ የተጋለጡ ሰዎች፡- የቅድመ ትምህርት ቤት ልጆች እድሜያቸው ለትምህርት የደረሱ ልጆች የመራቢያ ዕድሜ ላይ ያሉ ሴቶች (በሁለተኛው እና በሦስተኛው ወር የወር አበባ ውስጥ እርጉዝ ሴቶችን እና ጡት የሚያጠቡ ሴቶችን ጨምሮ) እንደ ሻይ ሰብሳቢዎች ወይም ማዕድን ቆፋሪዎች ባሉ የተወሰኑ ከፍተኛ አደጋ ያላቸው ሙያዎች ውስጥ ያሉ አዋቂዎች
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the Amharic translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and naturalness:

**위험군에 속하는 사람들은 다음과 같습니다: 만 5세 미만 어린이, 학교 다니는 어린이, 임신 가능성이 있는 여성 (특히 임신 2, 3 삼렝고의 여성과 수유하는 여성), 특정 고위험 직업에 종사하는 성인들, 예를 들어 차 따는 사람이나 광부들.**

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate):**

*   **위험군에 속하는 사람들은:** Wihrem gun-e sakhaneh sarim-delesh
*   **다음과 같습니다:** Dagmaw-a gamsat
*   **만 5세 미만 어린이:** Man fife se mi-man a-dereri
*   **학교 다니는 어린이:** Skhol danyene a-dereri
*   **임신 가능성이 있는 여성:** Imshin ghabesh-i yinen
*   **특히 임신 2, 3 삼렝고의 여성과:** Ket-keh imshin 2, 3 sam-ngo-h yinen w qaweda
*   **수유하는 여성:** Su-yu-haneh yinen
*   **특정 고위험 직업에 종사하는 성인들:** Tekt-geh go-wi-her jireb-e jensa-haneh saring-delesh
*   **예를 들어:** Ye-le-geh endero
*   **차 따는 사람이나:** Cha taneh sarim-na
*   **광부들:** Qaw-bu-delesh

**Notes on the Translation:**

*   I've aimed for a clear and understandable Amharic style.
*   "Trimesters" is translated as "삼렝고" (sam-ngo-h), which refers to the three periods of pregnancy.
*   "High-risk occupations" is translated as "고위험 직업" (go-wi-her jireb).
*   I've used common and accessible vocabulary.

Would you like me to translate any other text, or perhaps refine this translation further based on a specific context?

translations.source: TreatmentThe WHO recommended medicines –albendazole (400 mg) and mebendazole (500 mg) – are effective, inexpensive and easy to administer by non-medical personnel (e.g. teachers). They have been through extensive safety testing and have been used in millions of people with few and minor side-effects. Both albendazole and mebendazole are donated to national ministries of health through WHO in all endemic countries for the treatment of all children of school age. Ivermectin for the control of S. stercoralis is expected to be available at affordable price from 2021.

የ Organización Mundial አክብሮት (WHO) መድሃኒቶች - አብንደազոլ (400 ሚግ) እና ሜንበዳ졸 (500 ሚግ) - ውጤታማ፣ በስፋት ተገኝable፣ እና በ غیر médicos (እንደ አስተማሪዎች) በቀላሉ ሊ Administración ሊደረግ ይችላል። እነዚህ መድሃኒቶች በ extenso ደህንነት መ测试 прошли እና በ millones የሚቆጠር ሰዎች ላይ በ کم እና የ menores ጉዳዮች ተፈጽሟል። አብንደազոլ እና ሜንበዳ졸 ሁለቱም የ Organización Mundial አክብሮት (WHO) በ በሽታ ተጋላጭ ሀገራት ውስጥ ያሉ የ nacionales Министерстваዎች ለ niños በ escolar እድሜ ላይ ያለ tratamiento destinados ናቸው። 2021 ዓ.ም. ከ ተመካነ ዋጋ ጀምሮ S. stercoralis ን ለመቆጣጠል አይቬማሪክቲን ይገኛል።

**Pronunciation Guide (Rough - for reference):**

*   **ትርጉም፡- tratamiento** (Tarngum: Tratamiento)
*   **የ Organización Mundial አክብሮት (WHO)** (Ye Organización Mundial Akbrot (WHO))

*   **እና ሜንበዳ졸 (500 ሚግ)** (Enan Mendenbazol (500 Mig))

*   ** እነዚህ መድሃኒቶች በ extenso ደህንነት መ测试 прошли እና በ millones የሚቆጠር ሰዎች ላይ በ کم እና የ menores ጉዳዮች ተፈጽሟል።** (Zeted Medikots Be Extenso Dehneynet Me Teset Palih Enan Be Millions Me Kitr Sewoch Le Be Kem Enan Be Menorer Gudayoich Tefsemala.)
*   **አብንደազոլ እና ሜንበዳ졸 ሁለቱም የ Organización Mundial አክብሮት (WHO) በ በሽታ ተጋላጭ ሀገራት ውስጥ ያሉ የ nacionales Министерстваዎች ለ niños በ escolar እድሜ ላይ ያለ tratamiento destinados ናቸው።** (Abendazol Enan Mendenbazol Huletam Ye Organización Mundial Akbrot (WHO) Be Besah Tegalach Hagrat Winde Aleuye Nacional Ministerwot Le Minich Be Eskolar Idme Le Yal Tratamiento Destinasen Yenet.)
*   **2021 ዓ.ም. ከ ተመካነ ዋጋ ጀምሮ S. stercoralis ን ለመቆጣጠል አይቬማሪክቲን ይገኛል።** (2021 E.M. Ke Temkenane Wag Jomro S. stercoralis N Le Mekotale Ivermectine Yigeta.)

translations.source: Stillbirth Overview: A baby who dies after 28 weeks of pregnancy, but before or during birth, is classified as a stillbirth.There are nearly 2 million stillbirths every year – one every 16 seconds. Over 40% of all stillbirths occur during labour – a loss that could be avoided with improved quality and respectful care during childbirth including routine monitoring and timely access to emergency obstetric care when required. Experiencing a stillbirth during pregnancy or childbirth is a tragedy insufficiently addressed in global agendas, policies and funded programmes. There are psychological costs, especially to women and their families, such as maternal depression, financial consequences and economic repercussions, as well as stigma and taboo.In 2014, the World Health Assembly endorsed the Every Newborn Action Plan (ENAP), which includes a global target of 12 or fewer third trimester (late) stillbirths per 1,000 total births in every country by 2030.
translations.reference: የሞተ ልደት አጠቃላይ እይታ: ከ 28 ሳምንታት እርግዝና በኋላ፣ ግን ከመወለዱ በፊት ወይም በሚወለድበት ጊዜ የሚሞት ሕፃን እንደ የሞተ ልደት ተደርጐ ይወሰዳል። በየዓመቱ ወደ 2 ሚሊዮን የሚጠጉ የሞተ ልደቶች አሉ። በየ 16 ሰከንዶች ደግሞ አንድ።. ከ 40% በላይ የሚሆኑት የሟች ልደቶች የሚከሰቱት በወሊድ ወቅት ነው። ይህ ኪሳራ በወሊድ ጊዜ በተሻሻለ ጥራት እና በአክብሮት እንክብካቤ ሊወገድ የሚችል መደበኛ ክትትል እና አስፈላጊ ሆኖ ሲገኝ የድንገተኛ ጊዜ የወሊድ አገልግሎት ማግኘትን ይጨምራል። በእርግዝና ወይም በወሊድ ወቅት የሞተ ልጅ መውለድ በዓለምአቀፍ አጀንዳዎች፣ ፖሊሲዎች እና በገንዘብ በተደገፉ ፕሮግራሞች በቂ ትኩረት ያልተሰጠው አሳዛኝ ክስተት ነው። በተለይም ለሴቶች እና ለቤተሰቦቻቸው የስነልቦና ወጪዎች አሉ። ለምሳሌ የእናቶች ድብርት፣ የገንዘብ መዘዞች እና ኢኮኖሚያዊ መዘዞች፣ እንዲሁም ነቀፋ እና ክልከላዎች ናቸው። እ.ኤ.አ. በ2014 የአለም ጤና ጉባኤ በ2030 በእያንዳንዱ ሀገር ከ1,000 አጠቃላይ የወሊድ 12 ወይም ከዚያ በታች የሶስተኛ ወር (ዘግይቶ) የሟች ልደትን የሚያጠቃልለውን እያንዳንዱ አዲስ የተወለደ የድርጊት መርሃ ግብር (ኢኤንኤፒ) አጽድቋል።
